## Meeting Purpose

[Final interview for Managing Editor role at fwd.digital with candidate Jacob McPhail](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is a rapidly growing AI-native marketing agency, currently at $3M ARR, aiming for $12M by end of next year](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Role involves strategy, client management, and overseeing AI-driven content production workflows](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Compensation range is $80k-$100k, with potential for growth based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Company seeks fully committed team members to support rapid scaling and product development](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [fwd.digital is an AI-native marketing agency founded by Marcel Santilli](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Currently at $3M ARR, projecting $12M by end of next year](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Clients include Reddit, RAMF; contracts typically $15k-$45k/month](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Rapid growth driven by AI-powered workflows and high-level strategy](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Not yet publicly announced due to overwhelming demand](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)

### AI-Driven Content Production

  - [Developed 200+ step workflows for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Combines AI automation with human editing and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Workflows include research, outline generation, writing, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Adapts to client needs, from general topics to highly technical content](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Continuously improving workflows based on feedback and new AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

### Role Responsibilities

  - [Set content strategy and align with clients](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Oversee quality of AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Delegate tasks to AI workflows and junior team members](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Provide feedback to improve AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Upsell clients on additional services](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Potential to grow into leadership roles as company scales](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### Company Vision and Differentiation

  - [Aims to disrupt $200B+ marketing agency industry](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Focuses on delivering outcomes rather than selling software or tools](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Combines AI efficiency with high-level strategy from experienced marketers](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Building proprietary technology stack to support scalable operations](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

### Compensation and Expectations

  - [Salary range $80k-$100k, with upper end offered to Jacob](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Potential for raises based on performance (as seen with other team members)](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Seeking fully committed team members to support rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Open to flexible arrangements during transition period](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

### Jacob's Background and Motivations

  - [Currently a freelance consultant with established clients](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Seeking a role in a scaling company to build something tangible](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Interested in the innovative approach and growth potential at fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Not primarily motivated by compensation, more focused on the opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jacob to reflect on the opportunity over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Jacob to send a follow-up detailing his ideal scenario (timing, capacity, financials)](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Marcel open to further discussion and flexible arrangements](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Potential for future conversation if timing isn't right immediately](https://fathom.video/share/K69NAsJzFsq8YMNt_RP-TTzpvv-MYXsB?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
